source: Zachariah, K.C.; Mathew, E.T.; Rajan, S. Irudaya (2003). 'Dynamics of migration in Kerala: dimensions, differentials, and consequences.' Orient Longman.
sourceMethodology: Kerala Statistical Institute household survey, last conducted in 2000. Sample-based, not census.
denominator: Hindu population in the district. Multiply by district Hindu share (data/demographics.json) to get fraction of total district population.
note: Provenance verified via Wikipedia 'Demographics of Nair community' article which cites the same source. ~25 years old; geographic rank stable, absolute shares may have shifted. SC/ST share from this table is approximate; for authoritative SC/ST data per AC, aggregate Census 2011 PCA `pc11_pca_p_sc` / `pc11_pca_p_st` via SHRUG keys (separate pipeline). Only Nair, Ezhava, Brahmin transcribed cleanly from the original Wikipedia table image; columns after Brahmin had ambiguous parsing in the user's paste and are deferred until verified against the original.
